title: Kureha Reveals the Truth
description: On pages 10–12, this part focuses on kureha reveals the truth, showing the key character choices and conflict behind this chapter beat.
scene: Kureha Reveals the Truth. Chopper tries to save Hiriluk with the mushroom he believes is medicine, turning love and ignorance into tragedy. The scene description focuses on what the reader needs to understand before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Please! My child has a high fever!

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: Mine fell off a cliff! He needs urgent treatment!

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: The MD- 20 were scheduled to come to my house today!

dialogue.speaker: Drum villager
dialogue.text: I've waited over a week for a doctor!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Give us medicine!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Send out the MD-20!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Do they plan to just abandon all their patients!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: After all that talk about saving this country,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: You give up and ask me instead...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Are you saying you can't accomplish anything,

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: Even with the two weeks you still have left...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: That's not like you at all...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: -nor any time left...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: DON'T TELL ME...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Did you hear, Kureha? This country's in a real crisis right now.

dialogue.speaker: Hiriluk
dialogue.text: It's Dr. Hiriluk! Arrest him!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: As if I'd let you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Move it, you lot!

dialogue.speaker: Hiriluk
dialogue.text: Dr. Hiriluk!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: He's carrying bombs! Run for it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Take this!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: That quack is out of control!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Get this ropeway up to the castle!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I said take me up to the castle!

dialogue.speaker: Hiriluk
dialogue.text: Where's Hiriluk!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Ah-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Oh no!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: No need to hide, I ain't gonna eat you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: And I already know who you are.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Just tell me where Hillulk is right now!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: t-the doc said he'd be out for a bit...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: He's all recovered from his illness so maybe he's in the town...

summary: This part highlights kureha reveals the truth and moves the chapter forward through its central emotional or plot turn.
